subject: refactor(projects-agreements): migrate to DaisyUI card/alert/badge
body:
Projects:
- ProjectCard: `card card-compact bg-base-100` + `card-body`; status pill
  becomes `badge badge-success` / `badge badge-warning`. Hover lifts the
  border to `base-content/30`.
- HandshakeStatus: four state branches migrate to `alert alert-success`,
  `alert bg-base-200 border-base-300` (neutral "not invited" state),
  `alert alert-warning`, `alert alert-info`. Icons inherit `currentColor`
  from the alert so color-drift across themes is impossible.
- InviteCounterpartyForm: copy uses text-base-content tokens.

Agreements:
- AgreementCard: `card card-compact` + `card-body`; status map becomes
  badge variants (info/success/warning/secondary/ghost). "Accept request"
  footer moves into `card-actions` with a themed divider.
- AgreementHeader: same badge migration; editing input becomes input-ghost
  with a themed border-bottom. Delete hover is `text-error`.
- SequenceSignOff: two branches migrate to `alert alert-success` (fully
  agreed) and `alert alert-info` (pending). Per-party checkmarks extract
  into a local PartyApproval component — the duplicated SVG+label pair
  was only justifiable when the color strings differed, which they no
  longer do.
- AgreementModulesSection / AgreementNotesSection: section headings drop
  slate; inline add-note form wraps in `card card-compact bg-base-200`.
- SplitAgreementForm: checkbox list uses `divide-base-300`; `input
  type=checkbox` becomes `checkbox checkbox-sm checkbox-primary`.
- TitleDescriptionForm: help copy uses text-base-content/70.
- PdfPreview: screen surfaces follow the theme via base-* tokens; print:
  prefixes preserve the black-on-white PDF output. The 8 remaining
  `print:text-gray-*` references are deliberate overrides, not drift.

Zero hardcoded status utilities remain in src/components/projects/ or
src/components/agreements/ outside the print: context.

Tags: refactor, ui, daisyui, projects, agreements
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
title: migrate to DaisyUI card/alert/badge
